code: import{useState,useEffect}from'react';import axiosInstance from'../axiosConfig';import BookingForm from'../components/BookingForm';import BookingList from'../components/BookingList';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Bookings=()=>{const{user}=useAuth();const[bookings,setBookings]=useState([]);const[editingBooking,setEditingBooking]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{const fetchBookings=async()=>{try{const response=await axiosInstance.get('/api/bookings',{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${user.token}`}});setBookings(response.data);}catch(error){alert('Failed to fetch bookings.');}};if(user)fetchBookings();},[user]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container mx-auto p-6 max-w-2xl",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(BookingForm,{bookings:bookings,setBookings:setBookings,editingBooking:editingBooking,setEditingBooking:setEditingBooking}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(BookingList,{bookings:bookings,setBookings:setBookings,setEditingBooking:setEditingBooking})]});};export default Bookings;
